name: Banana Cinnamon Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the waffle iron with cooking spray and heat up.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine egg whites, milk, mashed banana, and applesauce.
4. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients just until moistened.
5. Pour enough batter into the waffle iron to fill two-thirds of it.
6. Cook until crisp and golden brown. Set aside.
7. Repeat with remaining batter.
